Pain Relief

Reducing pain, swelling, and inflammation are common goals in this phase of recovery. Injury protection, elevation, appropriate medications, compression, and patient education are important.

Introduce Movement

Pain-free passive, manual therapy, active range of motion, and cardiorespiratory e

71630bd185dd.plainText: Introduce Movement Pain-free passive, manual therapy, active range of motion, and cardiorespiratory exercises are indicated here. Education about pain and a positive attitude may help.
71630bd185dd.originalHtml:
Introduce Movement

Pain-free passive, manual therapy, active range of motion, and cardiorespiratory exercises are indicated here. Education about pain and a positive attitude may help.
71630bd185dd.previewContext:
/h3>

Reducing pain, swelling, and inflammation are common goals in this phase of recovery. Injury protection, elevation, appropriate medications, compression, and patient education are important.

Introduce Movement

Pain-free passive, manual therapy, active range of motion, and cardiorespiratory exercises are indicated here. Education about pain and a positive attitude may help.

Strengthening

Progressive loading of healing soft tissues, the reintroduction of low-stress

ac0494dd7209.plainText: Strengthening Progressive loading of healing soft tissues, the reintroduction of low-stress neuromuscular reeducation, balance training, and basic functional activities are part of this rehabilitation phase.
ac0494dd7209.originalHtml:
Strengthening

Progressive loading of healing soft tissues, the reintroduction of low-stress neuromuscular reeducation, balance training, and basic functional activities are part of this rehabilitation phase.
ac0494dd7209.previewContext:
roduce Movement

Pain-free passive, manual therapy, active range of motion, and cardiorespiratory exercises are indicated here. Education about pain and a positive attitude may help.

Strengthening

Progressive loading of healing soft tissues, the reintroduction of low-stress neuromuscular reeducation, balance training, and basic functional activities are part of this rehabilitation phase.

Functional Retraining

Progressing strengthening exercises, improving flexibility, and advan

cf110241e751.plainText: Functional Retraining Progressing strengthening exercises, improving flexibility, and advanced balance exercises are part of phase 4. Resuming functional movement occurs in this phase.
cf110241e751.originalHtml:
